name: Bread Stuffing
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Dry Bread Cubes (or 4 cups sliced bread)
1 cup Turkey Broth or Chicken Broth
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325°F (165°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine bread cubes, celery, onion, parsley, thyme, sage, black pepper, and dried marjoram.
3. Add turkey broth or chicken broth to the mixture and stir until all ingredients are well incorporated.
4. Stuff the mixture into a 10-pound turkey or four Cornish hens.
5. Place in a baking dish and cover with foil.
6. Bake for about 45-50 minutes, or until heated through and lightly browned on top.
7. Remove from oven and let cool slightly before serving.
Note: One Serving contains approximately 100 calories, 20 grams of carbohydrates, 5 grams of protein, 2 grams of fat, 199 milligrams of sodium, and 177 milligrams of potassium. It also provides 1 Bread Exchange and 1 Vegetable Exchange.
